_publications._publicationTitle: The loss of Nf1 transiently promotes self-renewal but not tumorigenesis by neural crest stem cells.

_contextSnippet: The sympathetic chain, DRG, and sciatic nerve from Nf1−/− embryos contained a significantly higher percentage of cells (3−6 fold higher; p<0.05) that formed multipotent neurospheres
details: 3-6 fold higher frequency of cells forming multipotent neurospheres in sympathetic chain, DRG, and sciatic nerve compared to controls (p<0.05)
